title: calotis pubescens
intro: Calotis pubescens, also known as the hairy knawel or woolly knawel, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antiparasitic properties. Herbal preparations of Calotis pubescens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
